name: Trolley & Long-Handle Wheel Chock
shortDescription: Wheeled trolley or long-handle wheel chocks for hands-free, no-stoop placement.
longDescription: For sites chocking wheels on every truck through a busy dock, bending down to place and retrieve a standard chock all day adds up. This trolley carries two chocks with a message plate to display and wheels them into place without stooping; the long-handle version does the same for single-chock use.

images.alt: Trolley & Long-Handle Wheel Chock supplied by Expert Safety Solutions, Vadodara

specs.label: Trolley chock
specs.value: 900x570x915mm, 20kg — two chocks per trolley, 10"x10" message plate

specs.label: Use case
specs.value: Fast, ergonomic wheel chocking for high-turnover fleets
